expressions.name: linear_mish_mish_fused
expressions.formula: 设输入 X ∈ R^{N×I}，权重 W_lin ∈ R^{O×I}，偏置 B_lin ∈ R^{O}。先计算线性映射 Z1[n,o] = B_lin[o] + Σ_{i=0}^{I-1} X[n,i] · W_lin[o,i]。再施加 Mish：M1[n,o] = Z1[n,o] · tanh(softplus(Z1[n,o])) = Z1[n,o] · tanh(log(1 + exp(Z1[n,o])))。再施加一次 Mish：Y[n,o] = M1[n,o] · tanh(log(1 + exp(M1[n,o])))。本题 N=128, I=10, O=20。该 expression 融合 GEMM + 两次 Mish。
expressions.boundary_treatment: Mish 内部 softplus 在 z ≫ 0 时 softplus(z) ≈ z，PyTorch 默认 threshold=20，当 z > 20 直接返回 z；逐元素无空间边界。

lowering_contract.preferred_schedule: Use one Triton GEMM tile over output axes (n,o): A tile X[n,i] shaped (BLOCK_M,BLOCK_K), B tile from original PyTorch Linear weight W_lin[o,i] shaped (BLOCK_K,BLOCK_O), then bias and two Mish activations in registers. Because W_lin is stored as (O,I), B tile address is W_ptr + offs_o[None, :]*10 + offs_i[:, None]; do not index original W_lin as i*O+o unless W_lin is explicitly prepacked/transposed. Use power-of-two tile meta values; logical O=20 and I=10 are masked tails.
forbidden_lowerings: Use tl.tanh/tl.math.tanh/tl.math.log1p for Mish on a backend where these APIs are unavailable.
Treat original nn.Linear weight layout (O,I) as contiguous (I,O).
Use non-power-of-two tl.arange tile bounds such as BLOCK_O=20 or BLOCK_K=10.
Define nested helper functions inside @triton.jit kernels.
Materialize intermediate Z1 or M1 tensors.

expressions.TDD_requirement: 需要数值对拍。参考实现为 torch.manual_seed(0) 下 self.linear(x); torch.nn.functional.mish(.); torch.nn.functional.mish(.) 串行，eval 模式。精度模式：手写 FMA + fp32 累加器，IEEE fp32；走 tl.dot+fp32 必须 input_precision='ieee' 或 'tf32x3'。容忍值推导分三步：步骤 1 ε_op=1.2e-7，K=I=10，ε_total≈1.2e-7*sqrt(10)≈3.8e-7，10x 余量后 rtol_base=atol_base=4e-6；步骤 2（cuBLAS 修正，关键）参考是 nn.Linear 走 cuBLAS TF32，rtol=atol=max(4e-6,1e-3)=1e-3；步骤 3 不触发。最终 **rtol=atol=1e-3**，主导因素是步骤 2 cuBLAS TF32。结构性检查：(a) 输出 shape=(128,20)；(b) Mish 单调（z>0 时输出>0）；(c) Mish(0)=0；(d) z 非常大时 Mish(z)≈z。失败诊断：(i) diff~1e-3 → cuBLAS TF32 预期；(ii) softplus 在 z 很大时溢出 → 没用稳定形式（z>thr 时返回 z）；(iii) 漏写一次 Mish → 与单次 Mish 参考不符；(iv) 输出 NaN → exp(Z1) 在 Z1≫0 时溢出，必须用 softplus 稳定实现。
